async def setdeadline_cmd(update, context):
 await update.message.reply_text("✅ /setdeadline command working from AutoPilot Hub!")

app.add_handler(CommandHandler("setdeadline", setdeadline_cmd))

app.run_polling(drop_pending_updates=True)
